zh.lifeSummary: 當Adèle d'Alcester於1056年出生在英國瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特時，她的父親Talsey d'Alcester27歲，母親Isabella de Pace Payes32歲。她和Robert Corbet至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1131年在英國瓦維其可爾享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Adèle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adèle d'Alcester was born in 1056, in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, her father, Talsey d'Alcester, was 27 and her mother, Isabella de Pace Payes, was 32. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Robert Corbet. She died about 1131, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adèle d'Alcester est née en 1056, à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Talsey d'Alcester, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Pace Payes, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Robert Corbet. Elle est décédée environ 1131, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adèle d'Alcester 1056 in Alcester, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Talsey d'Alcester 27 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Pace Payes 32. Sie hatte mit Robert Corbet mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1131 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adèle d'Alcester è nata il nel 1056 nel Alcester, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Talsey d'Alcester, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Pace Payes, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Robert Corbet. Morì circa 1131, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adèle d'Alcester(이)가 1056년 영국 워윅실르 알스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Talsey d'Alcester(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Pace Payes(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Robert Corbet(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1131년 영국 워윅실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Robert Corbet. Она умерла около 1131 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
